title: Add OAuth authorization and callback endpoints for Google services
goal: 사용자가 UI에서 'Google 연결' 버튼을 클릭하면 OAuth 인증 후 캘린더/Gmail이 실제로 작동하도록 한다. authorize URL 생성 엔드포인트, callback 코드 교환 엔드포인트, disconnect 엔드포인트, 연결별 OAuth 스코프 매핑을 추가한다.

test_requirements.expected: response contains auth_url with accounts.google.com and correct scope and state param

test_requirements.case: POST /setup/connections/google_calendar/callback with valid code+state exchanges tokens
test_requirements.expected: connection marked configured=True verified=True, tokens stored in secret_store
connection marked configured=False verified=False, tokens removed from secret_store

test_requirements.case: Gmail authorize returns auth_url with gmail scopes
Calendar authorize returns auth_url with calendar scope

test_requirements.expected: each authorize call generates unique state

constraints: Do not modify existing oauth.py functions (exchange_code_for_tokens, refresh_access_token, get_access_token)
State tokens stored in-memory dict with TTL (no external dependency)
Scopes defined per connection_id in oauth_scopes.py, not hardcoded in routes
test_command: cd backend && python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -v
